temporal_description: A wide shot reveals a dark, cavernous hall filled with rubble and debris. In the distance, two silhouetted figures stand in a large, arched doorway, illuminated by a warm, yellow light from behind. The hall has a high, vaulted ceiling, suggesting a grand, possibly ruined, structure. The camera is positioned low, looking up through the wreckage towards the figures. In the top right corner, the white text "风行网" is visible. The audio opens with a deep, resonant, and ominous thud, like a heavy stone falling or a massive structure collapsing, creating a sense of immense scale and destruction. This is immediately followed by a low, mournful, and atmospheric musical score. The music is slow and melancholic, carried by a somber, orchestral melody that evokes a feeling of desolation, mystery, and foreboding. The camera cuts to a tight close-up of a young man's face. He has dark, messy hair and wears round glasses. His expression is one of intense focus and concern as he looks slightly downward. The lighting is dim and moody, casting shadows across his face. The background is dark and out of focus. The white text "风行网" remains in the top right corner. The view shifts to a wide, panoramic shot of a vast, dark library. The camera appears to be moving slowly down a central aisle, flanked on both sides by towering, dark bookshelves that stretch high into the arched ceiling. The shelves are filled with countless books, their spines mostly obscured by the shadows. The overall atmosphere is one of immense, quiet, and slightly eerie stillness. The white text "风行网" is still present in the top right corner. The camera continues its slow journey down the library aisle, revealing more of the immense scale of the collection. The rows of bookshelves on either side create a sense of depth and enclosure. The lighting is minimal, casting long shadows and highlighting the texture of the stone arches and the dark wood of the shelves. The "风行网" text is visible in the top right. The shot continues to move through the dark library, showing the sheer density of the books and the grand, gothic architecture of the space. The camera's movement is steady, creating an immersive and slightly unsettling experience as it glides through the silent, shadowy rows. The "风行网" text remains on screen. There is no dialogue in the audio.
